metadata.title: A Month of Living — Beyond travel, a new way of life
metadata.description: Meet experts and programs tailored to your goals in Jeju, Thailand, and Vietnam.

footer.description: A premium platform for designing your month-long stay in Jeju, Thailand, and Vietnam around your goals
footer.status: We are currently preparing for launch.

home.title: Beyond travel — a month that becomes a new way of life.
home.subtitle: Meet experts and programs tailored to your goals in Jeju, Thailand, and Vietnam.

thailand.name: Thailand
thailand.cities: Bangkok · Chiang Mai · Phuket · Koh Samui

vietnam.name: Vietnam
vietnam.cities: Da Nang · Ho Chi Minh City · Hanoi · Nha Trang

home.notice: Fitness, yoga, golf, surfing, remote work, language learning, and wellness — we are building a service that connects you with local experts and programs that fit your goals.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The address may be incorrect, or the page may have been moved or deleted.

common.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please try again later.
common.unexpectedError: A temporary error occurred. Please try again later.

login.title: Log in
login.description: Log in with your email and password.
login.genericError: The email or password is incorrect, or the email has not been verified.
login.resetSuccessNotice: Your password has been reset. Please log in with your new password.

register.title: Sign up
register.description: Create an account with your email and password.
register.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, including at least one letter and one digit.
register.termsLabel: (Required) I agree to the Terms of Service
register.privacyLabel: (Required) I agree to the collection and use of personal information
register.marketingLabel: (Optional) I agree to receive marketing communications

sent.title: Check your inbox
sent.description: Unless no account exists for that address or it is already verified, a verification email has been sent. Open the link in the email to complete your registration.
sent.note: If the email hasn't arrived, check your spam folder or request it again below.
sent.resendDone: Your request has been processed. If an unverified account exists for that address, a verification email will be sent.

confirm.title: Verify your email
confirm.description: Click the button below to complete email verification.
confirm.missingToken: The verification link is invalid. Please check the link in your email.

verified.title: Email verified
verified.description: Your email has been verified. You can now log in.

alreadyVerified.title: Already verified
alreadyVerified.description: This account has already been verified. Please log in.

expired.title: Verification link expired
expired.description: The verification link has expired. Please request a new verification email.

invalid.title: Invalid verification link
invalid.description: The verification link is invalid or has already been used. Request a new verification email if needed.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your registered email and we will send you a password reset link.
forgotPassword.done: Your request has been processed. If an account exists for that address, a reset email will be sent.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.description: Enter the new password you want to use.
resetPassword.expired: The reset link has expired. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.invalid: The reset link is invalid or has already been used. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.missingToken: The reset link is invalid. Please check the link in your email.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.passwordTooShort: The password must be at least 8 characters long.
validation.passwordTooLong: The password is too long. Please use a shorter password.
validation.passwordNeedsLetterAndDigit: The password must include at least one letter and one digit.
validation.consentRequired: Please agree to the required terms.

verification.subject: [한달살기] Please verify your email
verification.body:
Welcome to 한달살기.

Open the link below to complete email verification. The link is valid for 24 hours and can be used only once.

{url}

If you did not request this, please ignore this email.

passwordReset.subject: [한달살기] Password reset instructions
passwordReset.body:
A password reset was requested for your account.

Set a new password using the link below. The link is valid for 30 minutes and can be used only once.

{url}

If you did not request this, please ignore this email. Your password will not be changed.
